message.content:
STEP 1 COMPLETE — Rules locked.
Key constraints: Primary 2-3, Secondary 2-3, Tertiary max 4.
Options: max 10 per spec, under 25 chars.
Banned: Other, Custom, N/A, Unbranded, As Required.
Output: single JSON, no markdown fences.

STEP 2 COMPLETE — Wiki fully read.

Section 9 Demand Signals (ranked):
  1. Conductor → PRIMARY
  2. Shielding → PRIMARY
  3. Packaging → PRIMARY
  4. Brand Tier → SECONDARY
  5. Jacket Type → SECONDARY

Section 10 confirms buyers first ask: Authenticity, Conductor Material, Quantity (305m), Compliance, Jacket Type.

Option values extracted from Section 3: 
- Conductor: 23 AWG Solid Bare Copper, 24 AWG Stranded Bare Copper
- Shielding: U/UTP, SFTP, Armored
- Packaging: 305 Meter Pull Box, 305 Meter Drum
- Jacket Type: PVC, FR-PVC, LSZH, PE
- Brand: D-Link, Commscope, Polycab, Havells, V-Guard, Finolex, Belden, Panduit, KEI, RR Kabel

Price drivers from Section 5: Brand Reputation, Conductor Material, Shielding & Armor, Jacket Material.
Certifications/use cases from Section 6/7: ANSI/TIA-568-C.2, ISO/IEC 11801, PoE Support, Outdoor/Indoor.
Brand decision from Section 4: Include. Brand is a top demand signal and price driver. Tier 1 and 2 brands are highly sought after.

Dimension rule: NO — Cat 6 is a standard specification; while length varies, it is captured under Packaging/Standard Length as per trade norms (305m).

STEP 3 COMPLETE.
Primary: Conductor | Shielding | Packaging
Secondary: Brand | Jacket Material
Tertiary: Performance Standard | Application | Conductor Gauge
Counts valid? Primary [3/3] Secondary [2/3] Tertiary [3/4]

STEP 4 — Audit...

TIERS
  [PASS] Primary = Section 9 top demand signals
  [PASS] Secondary = price drivers
  [PASS] Tertiary = certifications/applications
  [PASS] No spec in more than one tier
  [PASS] Single-value specs (Cat 6) excluded

SPEC NAMES
  [PASS] All names from Section 9 or 10
  [PASS] Title Case, stopwords lowercase
  [PASS] No duplicates, all 1–3 words

BRAND
  [PASS] Section 4 read, dominance checked, included in Secondary as price driver

DIMENSIONS
  [PASS] N/A - Standardized cable category

OPTIONS
  [PASS] Under 25 chars, no vague values
  [PASS] Correct symbols used
  [PASS] Max 10 per spec, reality-checked for Indian B2B

HALLUCINATION
  [PASS] Every spec name and option traceable to wiki

Overall: [ALL PASS → output]

{
  "category_name": "Cat 6 Cable",
  "finalized_specs": {
    "finalized_primary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Conductor",
          "options": [
            "Solid Bare Copper",
            "Stranded Bare Copper"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Shielding",
          "options": [
            "U/UTP (Unshielded)",
            "SFTP (Shielded)",
            "Armored"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Packaging",
          "options": [
            "305 Meter Pull Box",
            "305 Meter Drum",
            "500 Meter Drum",
            "1000 Meter Drum"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_secondary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Brand",
          "options": [
            "D-Link",
            "Commscope",
            "Polycab",
            "Havells",
            "V-Guard",
            "Finolex",
            "Belden",
            "Panduit",
            "KEI",
            "RR Kabel"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Jacket Material",
          "options": [
            "PVC",
            "FR-PVC",
            "LSZH",
            "PE (Polyethylene)"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_tertiary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Performance Standard",
          "options": [
            "ANSI/TIA-568-C.2",
            "ISO/IEC 11801",
            "EN 50173-1"
          ],
          "input_type": "multi_select"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Application",
          "options": [
            "Indoor",
            "Outdoor",
            "Data Center",
            "Industrial",
            "PoE Support"
          ],
          "input_type": "multi_select"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Conductor Gauge",
          "options": [
            "23 AWG",
            "24 AWG"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
